data.title: RED: Add sprint eval test for per-worktree serial review
data.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to sprint evals asserting Phase 5 processes worktrees serially with per-worktree review instead of batch review. Must FAIL against current sprint SKILL.md.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval has per-worktree review test case
  Verify: grep -q 'per.worktree\|serial.*review\|worktree.*review' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
